headings.text: How to Answer Overqualified Interview Questions in 2026

Why interviewers ask if you are overqualified
The best way to frame your answer
1. Acknowledge the concern
2. Explain why this role is attractive
3. Show commitment
Interview answer examples you can use
Example 1: You want less management and more hands-on work
Example 2: You are changing careers
Example 3: You are applying for a lower-level role on purpose
Example 4: You are returning to work after a break
